text:
Value-based Insurance Design (VBID) Model 
07 = Part D Senior Savings (PDSS) Model 
Null/missing = no Part D Model applied 

COMMENT: This variable was new in 2022 and required for plans participating the PDSS Model beginning in 2022 It 
is required for plans participating in the VBID Model beginning in 2023, and optional for VBID Model 
plans in 2022. 

CMS requires this field for covered drugs only.
